AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Sayın Bakana, ekibine çalışmalarından dolayı teşekkür ediyorum.
Sadece bir konuyu Sayın Bakanıma arz etmek isterim. Özellikle 6284'te koruyucu, önleyici tedbirlerin izleme ve takibi konusunda bir düzenlemeye ihtiyaç var. Bizim o anlamda verilere ulaşabilmemiz için koruyucu, önleyici tedbirlerin izleme takibinin verilere yansıması gerekiyor; işte, psikososyal destek, öfke kontrol programı ve benzeri gibi uygulamaların verilere yansıması konusunda bir çalışmaya ihtiyaç olduğunu da burada ifade etmek isterim.
Teşekkür ediyorum Sayın Başkan.
records.englishTranslation:
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Thank you, Mr. President.
I respectfully greet Mr. Minister, esteemed members of parliament and those present.
I will go into some topics as much as time allows, but I want to start with the women's issue first, and if time permits, I will touch on other issues.
First of all, I have to say this: Women and family policies are not hostile and competing policies - either, or - that is, either women's rights or family. AK PARTY is not in such a dilemma, and AK PARTY has been offering a perspective outside this dichotomous shallowness for twenty-two years. We say both family and women, as in many of our other policies. Therefore, I would like to specifically express the point where we differ here.
Of course, when we talk about women, we need to talk about education first because education is the most important tool for equal opportunities. Without education, we can neither talk about participation in the labor market, nor participation in decision-making mechanisms, nor fight against violence or poverty. Look, I'll give you some data: When you look at the relationship between female workforce participation and education, 68.8 percent of university graduate women can participate in the labor market. What does this mean? If we do not have this figure today, it means that those who made girls wait at the university gates in the past are responsible for this. I don't think you can get rid of this today by calling it "nonsense" or "halalization" because I am a personal witness and party to those days.
So, what happened today? What did the AK PARTY do regarding this issue of education, regarding the education of girls? Once upon a time, we made the bans a thing of the past. With the universities we opened in 81 provinces, today the female-male ratio among university students is 51 percent female, and from now on, we can talk about the labor market and the decision-making mechanism. I want to give you a few more numbers here. You know, when all the buttons are pressed from election to election, conservative women are either reminded of the achievements of the republic or "Women are confined to their homes." Their memorizations are brought to the agenda again; Look, what happened in these twenty-two years: In twenty-two years, the rate of female judges reached 47 percent. In these twenty-two years, our female research assistant ratio reached 51 percent; The rate of female lawyers reached 46 percent, the rate of doctors reached 44 percent, and the rate of teachers reached 60 percent.
SEVDA KARACA DEMİR (Gaziantep) - "We exploit them all by tying them to starvation wages." you say. Those who cannot survive on minimum wage increased at the same rate.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I listened to you, listen.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Karaca, please express your opinions when you take the floor.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I am mainly talking about the public sector.
On the other hand, women receive 41 percent of KOSGEB supports today. İŞKUR has some programs, I will not explain them one by one, but such as vocational training, active workforce, on-the-job training programs; 53 percent of those who benefit from these programs are women.
Let's talk about political participation: Turkish women made a very important gain in 1935, and the rate of women in the Parliament at that time was 4.1 percent.
Well, let me ask a question, have you ever asked yourself this question: Has this 4.1 percent rate ever been exceeded until the AK Party government in 2002? You were in power and a partner in power, has it ever been surpassed?

No, it was not exceeded, in fact it dropped below 1 percent during coup periods. The coups also harmed women's participation. The proportion of women in Parliament has been increasing gradually and systematically since 2002; This is the success of the AK PARTY, I am recording it. On the other hand.
NEVROZ UYSAL ASLAN (Şırnak) - What percentage did you get, leave it alone.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I listened to you, I expect the same political courtesy from you. Women should not use violence against women!
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - You asked a question.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - When the word comes to you, you answer.
Let's talk about the fight against violence: See, the most important first action of the AK PARTY. Take a look at the 2002 Election Declaration; We say how we will fight against violence against women and how we will fight against custom and honor killings in our first Election Declaration in 2002, we say it the first day we appear before the citizens. And what did we do next? We amended the Constitution in 2004 and for the first time, "Men and women are equal." The provision entered the Constitution in our period.
ÖZGÜL SAKİ (Istanbul) - Then he said, "There is no equality in nature." you said.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I say Constitution! Are you talking about a provision that is more important than the Constitution?
(Noises)
ÖZGÜL SAKİ (Istanbul) - It is against the Constitution.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Keşir, continue.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I continue. I continue.
Look, in this country until 2005.
ÖZGÜL SAKİ (Istanbul) - In your own language.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Do not provoke!
ÖZGÜL SAKİ (Istanbul) - It is you who provoked it, not me.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Violence against women was not even defined as a crime in this country until 2005. Look, we made a radical Turkish Penal Code regulation in 2005 and defined violence against women as a crime.
NEVROZ UYSAL ASLAN (Şırnak) - Women won these by fighting and dying.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Let me say something else: We defined the act of sexual assault as a crime in the Turkish Penal Code in 2005.
NEVROZ UYSAL ASLAN (Şırnak) - Ask your Minister of Justice how much it applies.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I continue, I want to go into the Istanbul Convention.
Look, our representatives have put up a banner here saying "The Istanbul Convention will live on." saying. So, why do we say this? With what infrastructure do we say this? What is the situation in Europe? What laws have been passed in Europe? How was it implemented? Is the Istanbul Convention kept alive in other countries but not in Türkiye? Look, 45 countries signed the Istanbul Convention. 6 of these 45 countries did not even pass it through the National Assembly or did anything; There is Czechia and Armenia. On the other hand, 7 countries have not made any regulations in their domestic law, although they passed it through their Parliament. Which countries are there? There are countries such as Estonia, Finland, Switzerland and Norway; These countries have not made any regulations, not a single legal regulation. "The Istanbul Convention keeps alive" in these countries. can we say? We cannot say.
ADALET KAYA (Diyarbakır) - 45 women are killed per month in these countries.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - 26 countries have made reservations, including Finland, Sweden, the United Kingdom and Denmark; They made reservations.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Wow, what examples!

AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Some countries have made partial regulations. The Netherlands only includes domestic violence as an aggravated crime.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Tell us about our country.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Belgium has recently added a clause to the Penal Code. Germany is the most comprehensive; He also added some clauses to the Constitution, Criminal Code and Civil Code.
In summary, I say this: No country that signed, made reservations, implemented or did not implement the Istanbul Convention has enacted an independent law, except Türkiye; I want to particularly underline this. Of course, I have to say this: AK PARTY's fight against violence against women - I just said - is not only indexed to the Istanbul Convention; I just told you what we did in 2004 and 2005. Look, in 2009, the Equal Opportunities Commission for Women and Men was established, again before the Istanbul Convention.
So, what did we do after the Istanbul Convention? Yes, we passed Law No. 6284, we left in 2020. Look what arrangements we made after we left in 2020. First of all, it is after 2020 that we include violence against women within the scope of intentional injury, killing with a monstrous motive. In 2021, we increased the penalties for violence committed against a divorced spouse to the same level as a married spouse. Again, on good behavior discount in 2022.
(Noises)
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Friends, you do not know about the law. For God's sake, listen!
ADALET KAYA (Diyarbakır) - We are aware of all of them.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Keşir, continue.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - In 2022
We excluded tie and similar good behavior discounts from the scope of violence against women.
ÖZGÜL SAKİ (Istanbul) - You do not have a preventive policy.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Look, we did these after leaving the contract.
I also have to say this, on what basis am I saying this? I gave Türkiye's report card, but I have to say this, which I hope you probably follow: The European Council published a directive last May, a 51-article directive on violence against women. What did he say to the countries? He said to the countries: "You signed the convention on violence against women but you did nothing, implement these 51 articles."
I sat down and studied, friends. I don't read the ready-made text in front of me, I study.
NEVROZ UYSAL ASLAN (Şırnak) - Everyone is working, how nice.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I compared those 51 articles with Turkish domestic law. I compared those 51 articles one by one with Turkish domestic law; Look, here, okay, I sat and studied. And each of these 51 articles, each of the 51 articles in the directive given by the council in May, exists as primary and secondary regulation in Turkish domestic law. There are also 2 more. What's in this? 1) There is an electronic clamp. 2) The victim's identity and address are concealed, just like in the witness protection program. The European Council hasn't even proposed these two yet.
Which contract are you talking about? The European Council gave three years to the countries: "Regulate your domestic law accordingly until June 2027." he said. Just the publication of this directive "keeps the contract alive." What you say is an indication that you are instrumentalizing violence against women and that it is a balloon.

I especially want to underline this, I especially want to underline this.
NEVROZ UYSAL ASLAN (Şırnak) - It's not a balloon, it's court decisions.
HALIDE TÜRKOĞLU (Diyarbakır) - Then why did these women die, why are they dying? Why is it so easy for women to die?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Let's come to another topic: Especially shelters and guesthouses are something that I care about very much and for many years I have been working as a woman since 2010. Look, I have been working as a woman since I was 17 years old; I don't speak by heart, I don't speak with the text that comes to me.
ADALET KAYA (Diyarbakır) - At least 3 women are killed every day.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - The law obliges local governments to open shelters, right? Yes, both the Ministry and local governments are responsible.
ÖZGÜL SAKİ (Istanbul) - The trustees you appointed closed the shelters.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Well, let me look at the 3 metropolitan cities, Ankara Metropolitan Municipality has not opened a shelter since 2019. We look at the municipalities of Izmir; In Izmir, Bayraklı, Bornova and Karşıyaka closed the shelters with a total capacity of 88 people, and only the Metropolitan Municipality opened 2 shelters in 2010 and 2021, with a capacity of 45 people.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Either the state or you will do it, Ms. Ayşe.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Let's come to Istanbul. There are shelters closed in Istanbul as well, and only the Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality opened a shelter with a capacity of 40 in 2024. I look at words and also look at actions. Now let's sit here and talk straight, okay?
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - The Ministry has a huge Ministry budget that has remained at 113 since 2020.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Let's talk about another topic: If we are going to talk about violence against women, we need to talk about wars, today's Palestine, and if we are going to talk about violence against women, we need to talk about terrorism. Look, the speakers used international concepts very well here.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Dear Deputy, while we were talking, Filiz was murdered in Esentyurt, Istanbul. If you want, let's talk about this first. You say "shelter", but the Ministry has remained at 113 since 2020.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Kaya, please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - You are taking away my right to speak.
President, I want my term to be extended.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Extend it Mr. Keşir, we have endless respect for you.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Keşir, wait a minute. Dear Kaya, please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Friends, they are very good at speaking about international literature. "Women's participation in economic life" is a very nice sentence; "economic freedom", "participation in decision-making mechanisms" "fighting women's poverty", each of these are memorized sentences in international literature. Which one is this here? Which one is this here? Not every girl here, right? Aren't the people here poor? Look, "I leaned my back on YPG." I ask this to those who say. Aren't these all girls here? Don't they have poverty? Isn't education their most fundamental right? Will they participate in decision-making mechanisms with weapons? I have to say this here: The average age of these children is under 18 and 51 percent are primary school graduates.
NEVROZ MAKING ASLAN (Şırnak) - How do you know?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Where is the education? Where is economic freedom? Where is the fight against poverty?

This is the future of the girl child promised by those who rely on YPG.
ADALET KAYA (Diyarbakır) - You show the same photo every year.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Just as those who keep girls waiting at the university gates do not have the right to talk about women's right to education today, those who ignore this do not have the right to say a single word about violence against women.
SÜMEYYE BOZ ÇAKI (Muş) - Do not deviate, talk about the facts, please do not deviate from the topic.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - As a woman, I do not give you this right and I will not feed Nene Hatun's grandchildren to the PKK! Know it this way. (Noises)
SÜMEYYE BOZ ÇAKI (Muş) - We do not buy from you! Of course we will ask you this.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear MPs, please answer when you take the floor.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - There are United Nations reports, June 2015; There is a UNICEF report, June 2014; 2020 report of the United States Department of State; again, the 2022 report of the United Nations; According to the 2019 report of the United Nations Secretary General, there is an agreement between Vinginia Gamba and YPG/PKK. All of these are the most important indicators of how international organizations, PKK and YPG arm girls, children and children under the age of 15.
SÜMEYYE BOZ ÇAKI (Muş) - Tell us a little about the penalties given to Türkiye by international organizations!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Those who rely on YPG cannot talk about this issue! As long as you feed these children, you have no right to talk about this issue, you have no right to say anything about it!
SÜMEYYE BOZ ÇAKI (Muş) - You speak with such arrogance.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - You are interrupting me where it is not in your interest.
We will not allow the grandchildren and daughters of Black Fatmas and Nene Hatuns to be fed to the YPG and PKK in this country.
Today, a large part of the operations carried out by the Ministry of National Defense across the border is to save these girls from poverty and terrorism.
SÜMEYYE BOZ ÇAKI (Muş) - Instead of talking about all this heroism, you could have talked about your policies.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - It was built to ensure access and participation in business life; I want to express this here too.
ADALET KAYA (Diyarbakır) - You do the same thing every year!
SÜMEYYE BOZ ÇAKI (Muş) - This is your style of politics!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Do not terrorize this place, do not terrorize this place!
GÜLCAN KAÇMAZ SAYYİĞİT (Van) - Are you kidding us?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Do not terrorize this place!
ADALET KAYA (Diyarbakır) - You do the same thing every year, you come with the same photo every year!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Do not terrorize this place!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear deputies, let's listen to the orator; Your spokespersons respond where necessary.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Let's talk about social aid. Look, the social state principle of the Constitution was embodied in these twenty-two years. On what basis am I saying this? I say this as someone who works in the field. Look, when we came to power in 2002.
(Noises)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Keşir, one minute, one minute.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - President, my time is running out, but I will ask.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - This young girl was strangled to death by her father!

CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Kaya, you have spoken. The spokesperson has time, please, here.
NEUROSIS TYPICAL ASLAN (Şırnak) - Give a warning to your own orator for clean language and proper speaking! Is this it? So much provocation.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - There is no problem with his language, he expresses his views; There is no issue that we would invite to speak cleanly, but I invite you not to get involved in such a thing.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I call PKK "terrorist", why are you taking offense? I call those who rely on YPG "terrorists", why do you take offense?
ADALET KAYA (Diyarbakır) - You are wagging your finger at us!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - You have friends who are members of the Commission here, please.
SÜMEYYE BOZ ÇAKI (Muş) - But shouting like that.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Why are you taking offense?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Either he expresses his opinions and you state that you disagree and that it is wrong. So, we can continue this in a civilized way.
Mr Keshir, go ahead.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Mr. President, my time is running out, if you allow me, I would like to continue.
CHAIRMAN ORHAN ERDEM - Go ahead, continue.
NİLGÜN ÖK (Denizli) - Listen calmly, let everyone talk when it's their turn!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - In 2002, there were social aid items in only 4 areas and I remember those times very well, the measure was: "Does it have social security or not?" The possibilities were such and it was the only way it could be done. Today, that is no longer the standard. Apart from "whether there is social security or not", the per capita income of the household is taken into consideration. Different transactions on different items.
Let me say this: For example, there is a Family Support Program today, the total for 2023 and 2024 is 42 billion. There are grants for needy families and children; There is conditional education and conditional health benefits. Look, there is an aid item for the families of children who go to military service.
ADALET KAYA (Diyarbakır) - You established a charity system!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - On the other hand, here.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Tell us how much you give per household!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Our Minister just explained the foster family system, I do not want to go into it too much. This issue is a campaign that will be an example for the world, within OECD countries and within the United Nations.
On the other hand, (SED) Social and Economic Support, I cannot understand why you underestimate this. This HIA is the basic concept of fighting against poverty and families should not leave their children in institutions just because of poverty; If there is no abuse, addiction, etc., so that the child can continue to be cared for by the family.
I would especially like to point this out here: The fact that it has increased to 58 items today is not an increase in poverty, but actually the spread of prosperity from the bottom segment of society, that bottom segment that has no security or insurance, upwards. You could understand this if you had a little social policy literacy.
NEUROSIS TYPICAL LION (Şırnak) - Prosperity does not come with help!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) -
Thank you Mr. President.
NEUROSIS TYPICAL LION (Şırnak) - Welfare cannot increase with help.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - "We do social aid." As you say, you pay 2,280 lira per household.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I would like to thank Mr. Minister and his team for their work.
I would just like to raise one issue to my Minister.

Especially in 6284, there is a need for regulation regarding the monitoring and follow-up of protective and preventive measures. In order for us to access data in that sense, the monitoring of protective and preventive measures must be reflected in the data; Here, I would like to express that there is a need for a study on the reflection of practices such as psychosocial support, anger management program and similar practices in the data.
Thank you, Mr. President.

records.originalTurkish:
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Teşekkür ediyorum Başkanım.
Ben de sözlerimin başında hava şehitlerimize rahmet diliyorum, mekânları cennet olsun.
Bugün aynı zamanda 12 Kasım, 1999 Düzce depreminin yıl dönümü. Bu vesileyle, depremde vefat eden vatandaşlarımızı da buradan anmak istiyorum. Şehrin yüzde 83'ünün yıkıldığı depremden sonra, daha sonra yeni yapılaşmayla şehrin şu an yaklaşık yüzde 80'inde deprem şartnamesine uygun olarak yeniden yapılaşılmıştır. Bu anlamda, tekrar aynı acıların yaşanmaması için var gücümüzle çalışacağımızı ifade etmek istiyorum.
Süremin azlığı nedeniyle hızlıca birkaç hususa değinmek istiyorum. Öncelikle, sizlerle anlaşamadığımız bir husus var; bizde, AK PARTİ'de siyasetin bir paradigma değişikliği var, bunu anlamanızı beklemiyorum. Biz ya kadın hakları ya aile demiyoruz, birinden birini tercih etmiyoruz. Daha ilk seçim beyannamemizde bile hem ailenin güçlenmesi hem kadının güçlenmesi dedik; merak edenler açıp bakabilirler. Onun için...
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Onun için mi yüzde 1 pay ayırdınız bütçeden, yüzde 1!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Değil, onu da yanlış biliyorsunuz, söyleyeceğim, azıcık sabredin.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Yok, doğru biliyoruz.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Böyle bir paradigma değişikliğini anlamanızı beklemiyorum; ya, ya da tercihi yapmıyor AK PARTİ.
Diğer yandan "Bütçede yüzde 1..." diyorlar, biraz alanı çalışanları konuştursanız aslında bu konuda daha verimli ilerleyeceğimizi düşünüyorum. Bakın, bütçe rakamları burada, "kadının güçlenmesi" başlığını baz alıyorsunuz ama Bakanlığı hiç tanımadığınız ve bilmediğimiz o kadar belli ki.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Çok iyi biliyoruz.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Yoksullukla mücadele ve sosyal yardımların yüzde 61'i kadınlara gidiyor, orada gördüğünüz 284 milyarın 173 milyarı kadınlara gidiyor.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Sosyal yardım alan kadının güçleneceğini mi düşünüyorsunuz?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Keza, engelliler için ayrılan bütçenin yüzde 52'si, 128 milyarın yüzde 52'si yani 66 milyar yine kadınlara gidiyor.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Kadının güvencesini sağlamak durumundasınız, kadını her açıdan güçlendirmek yardım değil.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Alanı bilmeyenler konuşmasın, boşuna vakit kaybediyoruz.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Bilmemek değil bu, kadını güçlendireceksin.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Diğer yandan, sosyal yardımlarla ilgili yine alanı bilmeyen arkadaşların söyledikleriyle ilgili ifade edeyim. Vaktinde bu kurum kurulurken -çok kıymetli bir zamanda kuruldu- sadece 4 yardım kalemi vardı, sadece 4 yardım kalemi vardı.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Kadını birey olarak var edeceksin.
ALİYE TİMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - "Kadının güçlendirilmesi" diye başlık atmayı çok iyi biliyorsunuz.
OTURUM BAŞKANI NİLGÜN ÖK - Değerli milletvekilleri, lütfen dinleyelim.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Yapılan sosyal yardım kadını güçlendirmeli.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Bugün 49'a çıkmasını "Yoksulluğu artırdınız." diye okuyorlar.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Ya, sosyal yardıma ne gerek var, adaletli gelir dağılımı yapın.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Bu, sadece Aristo mantığıyla okumaktadır.
ALİYE TİMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - Bir kere alanı sen biliyorsun, bir alanı çık, bir pazara git, bir gör kadınların hâlini.
MÜHİP KANKO (Kocaeli) - Ne pazarı ya, pazarda işleri mi var?

records.englishTranslation:
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Thank you, Chairman.
At the beginning of my words, I wish mercy to our air martyrs, may they rest in peace.
Today is also the anniversary of the 12 November, 1999 Düzce earthquake. On this occasion, I would like to commemorate our citizens who died in the earthquake. After the earthquake, in which 83 percent of the city was destroyed, approximately 80 percent of the city has now been reconstructed in accordance with earthquake specifications, with new construction. In this sense, I would like to express that we will work with all our strength to prevent the same pain from happening again.
Due to lack of time, I would like to quickly touch upon a few points. First of all, there is something we cannot agree on with you; There is a paradigm shift in politics in our AK PARTY, I do not expect you to understand this. We do not say either women's rights or family, we do not prefer one or the other. Even in our first election declaration, we said both the strengthening of the family and the empowerment of women; Those who are curious can open it and take a look. For him.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Is that why you allocated 1 percent share from the budget, 1 percent?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - No, you know that wrong too, I'll tell you, have a little patience.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - No, we know it right.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I do not expect you to understand such a paradigm change; AK PARTY does not choose either or.
On the other hand, "1 percent in the budget." They say, I think we would progress more efficiently in this regard if you let the people working in the field talk a little. Look, the budget figures are here, you base them on the title of "women's empowerment", but it is obvious that you do not know the Ministry at all and we do not know it.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - We know very well.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - 61 percent of poverty alleviation and social aid goes to women, 173 billion of the 284 billion you see there goes to women.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Do you think that women receiving social assistance will become stronger?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Likewise, 52 percent of the budget allocated for the disabled, 52 percent of 128 billion, that is, 66 billion, goes to women.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - You have to ensure the security of women, empowering women in every aspect is not help.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Those who do not know the field should not talk, we are wasting our time.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - This is not about not knowing, you will empower women.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - On the other hand, let me express what friends who do not know the field say about social aid. When this institution was established at the time - it was established at a very important time - there were only 4 aid items, only 4 aid items.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - You will create women as individuals.
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - You know very well how to write a title like "Women's empowerment".
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please let's listen.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Social aid provided should empower women.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - "You have increased poverty." they read.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Why is there a need for social aid? Distribute income fairly.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - This reads only with Aristotelian logic.
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - First of all, you know the area, go out to an area, go to a market, see the situation of women.

MÜHİP KANKO (Kocaeli) - What kind of market? Do they have business in the market?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Look, there is an approach called "inclusive development approach" in social policies. I request those who do not know this not to talk about this issue.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - I don't think you should talk!
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - What did you talk about?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Among only 4 aid items.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Leave those pink paintings!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Today there are 49 items, including electricity support, uninterrupted power supply support for chronic diseases, assistance to military families, etc. This is the result of Turkey sharing the increased prosperity as a result of this inclusive development approach, that is, Türkiye, which is in the upper middle income group.
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - You just write on paper.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Did your prosperity increase with 22 thousand liras? Look at the minimum wage, the minimum wage.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - When it doesn't work for you, you shout, that's what you always do.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - "This is prosperity." If you say, come, let's do that prosperity.
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - You must be in a dream world.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please. Please let's restore calm.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - On the other hand, I have to express this: Look, it has been a year and a half, the European Council published a declaration on May 24, 2024. He published this declaration to the countries that signed the Istanbul Convention. We haven't heard a single sentence about this for a year and a half now. What did the European Council say? "You signed the contract, this much time has passed, but you have not done what is necessary." He said to all European countries and published 51 articles in this declaration.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - What did we do?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - You didn't even look at it, you are talking by heart.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - What did we do, us?
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - What did you do?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - He published 51 articles a year and a half ago and said "2026."
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Wow! Wow!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Don't stand up, sit down! Sit down! Sit down, you don't know!
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - 391 people died as of today, 391 women.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - You keep repeating the same words!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Kaya, please.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - 391 women died as of today.
ŞENGÜL KARSLI (Istanbul) - What a woman does to another woman is such a shame!
(Noises)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Kaya, please.
Dear friends, please take your seats. Please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - You don't know, sit down!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Mr. Keşir, please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - It's been a year and a half.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - May the blame be upon you, 391 women!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - You didn't say a single sentence about this issue because you don't know about it!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please.
(Noises)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, let's establish silence.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - The Council of Europe said to the countries that signed the Istanbul Convention - 51 articles - "I am giving you three years, do what is necessary." he said.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - 391 women!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - European countries did not comply with the contract.

ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - When you gave up the contract, it was the time when the lowest number of femicides were committed.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - So, what did we do? Look, you accuse us of breaking the contract. Those 51 items.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Give account of 391 women, 391!
SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - You did not leave the contract and we are wrong?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - We compared those 51 articles with our domestic law. Even though we left the agreement, we compared the 51 articles given by the Council of Europe in the declaration with our domestic law and we have fulfilled all of them. Plus, we have 2 more apps; one is electronic bracelet, one is changing the identity of the victim.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - There are 391 deaths among women, 391 among the public.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Don't speak ignorantly, don't speak ignorantly!
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Account for 391 women.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - On the other hand.
(Noises)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - On the other hand.
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - If you did it, why did you come out?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please.
Dear MPs, when it is your turn to speak, you can explain your point. Please.
(Noises)
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Their voices cannot be heard.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - After leaving the Istanbul Convention, we never took a step back in our determination to combat violence against women.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Explain this first, explain this!
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Your determination.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Look, we have made a regulation regarding the violence applied to divorced spouses to be applied to married spouses.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Tell me about determination, tell me!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - We abolished ties and similar regulations that were good conduct practices.
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - What did you remove?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - We removed it.
On the other hand.
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - You do everything on paper!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Ms. Aliye, we cannot hear you.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Ağbaba, please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Of course, it is normal for there to be such an outburst of anger as their ignorance is revealed.
(Noises)
SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Our anger is for the murdered women, Mr. Keşir!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Look, on the other hand, it has been twenty-three years and "You lock women in the house." you say.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Ms. Semra, we can't hear Ms. Semra.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Friends, while you were turning women away from the school gates, today, under the AK Party government, 52 percent of girls are university graduates.
(Noises)
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - Oh, that's enough!
REŞAT KARAGÖZ (Amasya) - But they are all in vain!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - While you put women in Parliament, today 20 percent of the deputies in the Parliament are women.
(Mutual exchanges and noises between AK PARTY and CHP MPs)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Kaya, please. It's not possible by standing up, Mr. Kaya, please sit down.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Maybe you will be ashamed, maybe you will be ashamed!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - It is under this roof that you put women in their place and put them in front of the door.

(Mutual exchanges and noises between AK PARTY and CHP MPs)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Mr. Kaya. Dear friends, please.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Saliha is looking at you, Saliha!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Sit down, sit down!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - While their husbands put the women in front of the door. Look, here, read, read a little.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Look at this! Look at this, this!
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - What's wrong with that!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please take your seats.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Today, 60 percent of faculty members are women and 51 percent of research assistants are women.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Look at this, this!
SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - How many are rectors? Say them too. How many of them does your President appoint as rectors?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Today, 46 percent of judges are women, and 56 percent of those working in the health sector today are women. Today, the rate of female associate professors is 40 percent. Are these the women we locked in their homes?
(Noises)
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - How will you look at these?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - You speak ignorantly, you speak by heart and you still abuse women's rights!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Mr. Keşir.
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - There is 1 woman in 17 ministers!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear friends, dear MPs; We can't get anywhere by standing up like this, shouting and yelling at each other. Please.
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - There is 1 woman in 17 ministers!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. President, we cannot hear our friends.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, I request you.
(Noises)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Friends.
ŞENGÜL KARSLI (Istanbul) - Violence of women against women.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs. Dear Brother.
Dear Ağbaba, please intervene in your group.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - We cannot hear the voices of our friends.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Ağbaba, please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I have nothing to say about the fight against violence against women.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - It never ends!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - It doesn't end.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear friends, please let's stay calm.
(Noises)
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Look, when our friends here talk about the responsibilities of municipalities with Law No. 5393.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Let him understand this, let him look at this!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Kaya, please let's stay calm.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - You made a lot of illustrations,
You walked around the edge.
You have not been able to open a shelter in the last five years, especially in Istanbul and Ankara; Come on, I understand, you failed, but why did you close the shelters opened by AK PARTY municipalities in Pendik and Eyüp, why?
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - You had the Ankara Municipality for twenty-five years, why didn't you open it?
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - It is the responsibility of the state! Do not put the responsibility of the state on municipalities; You manage a huge billion-dollar budget!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Why did you close the shelters opened by AK PARTY municipalities in Pendik and Eyüpsultan? Did you fail to manage them? In that sense, don't talk at all! Don't talk at all!

ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - You had Ankara for twenty-five years, you could not open anything other than ANKAPARK!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - On the other hand, when one of our speakers just spoke about SED aid, I am truly sorry that you are ignorant on the subject, on behalf of this Commission, because look, socioeconomic support.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - You are the ignorant one! You are the ignorant one! Speak carefully, you are the ignorant one!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Open it and read it!
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - You are the ignorant, you, you!
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Ignorant!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I said "Ignorant of the subject", don't divert the conversation!
Socioeconomic support is a support given only to those in economic poverty; a support given to families who have fallen into temporary poverty due to disaster or illness; A support provided for children in foster care.
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - Well, half of the country is already suffering from economic poverty, half of the country is suffering!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Where is there abuse and where is there rape? Those who are ignorant on the subject, those who are not experts, those who do not know the concepts, please do not come here and provoke this place.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - In the municipal elections in Osmaniye, your AK PARTY officials distributed AFAD boxes! Please explain this, explain this! I came upon it too!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - One of the previous speakers said a word that made me very sad; I waited for the minutes but couldn't find them; I hope I misunderstood. "Child mafia," he said. Look, a speaker used the phrase "child mafia." This is a sign that the subject and concepts are not known. When talking about crime and crime-related issues related to children, this is determined by the literature and the concept expressed here is "children dragged into crime". I would also like to put on record that I reject the term "child mafia" here.
Dear Minister, congratulations on your budget. Of course, we have shortcomings; As human beings exist, new needs emerge, and politics is the art of finding solutions to these new needs.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - So you couldn't find it for twenty-three years!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I hope that your budget will be auspicious, with the belief that you will solve all the newly emerging needs with this new budget.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Thank you, Mr. Keşir.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Femicide made a comeback during your period, and you couldn't do anything in twenty-three years! It is increasing logarithmically every year.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Kaya, please.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - You couldn't give an answer to this table, that chart!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Go and hold the municipalities accountable!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear friends.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - We return these insulting speeches to you! Your insulting expressions suit you! The word "ignorant" suits you! I'm returning it all to you, but only to you!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Go and hold the municipalities accountable!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please, that's enough.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Go and hold the municipalities accountable!

records.originalTurkish:
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Teşekkür ediyorum Başkanım.
Ben de sözlerimin başında hava şehitlerimize rahmet diliyorum, mekânları cennet olsun.
Bugün aynı zamanda 12 Kasım, 1999 Düzce depreminin yıl dönümü. Bu vesileyle, depremde vefat eden vatandaşlarımızı da buradan anmak istiyorum. Şehrin yüzde 83'ünün yıkıldığı depremden sonra, daha sonra yeni yapılaşmayla şehrin şu an yaklaşık yüzde 80'inde deprem şartnamesine uygun olarak yeniden yapılaşılmıştır. Bu anlamda, tekrar aynı acıların yaşanmaması için var gücümüzle çalışacağımızı ifade etmek istiyorum.
Süremin azlığı nedeniyle hızlıca birkaç hususa değinmek istiyorum. Öncelikle, sizlerle anlaşamadığımız bir husus var; bizde, AK PARTİ'de siyasetin bir paradigma değişikliği var, bunu anlamanızı beklemiyorum. Biz ya kadın hakları ya aile demiyoruz, birinden birini tercih etmiyoruz. Daha ilk seçim beyannamemizde bile hem ailenin güçlenmesi hem kadının güçlenmesi dedik; merak edenler açıp bakabilirler. Onun için...
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Onun için mi yüzde 1 pay ayırdınız bütçeden, yüzde 1!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Değil, onu da yanlış biliyorsunuz, söyleyeceğim, azıcık sabredin.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Yok, doğru biliyoruz.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Böyle bir paradigma değişikliğini anlamanızı beklemiyorum; ya, ya da tercihi yapmıyor AK PARTİ.
Diğer yandan "Bütçede yüzde 1..." diyorlar, biraz alanı çalışanları konuştursanız aslında bu konuda daha verimli ilerleyeceğimizi düşünüyorum. Bakın, bütçe rakamları burada, "kadının güçlenmesi" başlığını baz alıyorsunuz ama Bakanlığı hiç tanımadığınız ve bilmediğimiz o kadar belli ki.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Çok iyi biliyoruz.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Yoksullukla mücadele ve sosyal yardımların yüzde 61'i kadınlara gidiyor, orada gördüğünüz 284 milyarın 173 milyarı kadınlara gidiyor.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Sosyal yardım alan kadının güçleneceğini mi düşünüyorsunuz?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Keza, engelliler için ayrılan bütçenin yüzde 52'si, 128 milyarın yüzde 52'si yani 66 milyar yine kadınlara gidiyor.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Kadının güvencesini sağlamak durumundasınız, kadını her açıdan güçlendirmek yardım değil.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Alanı bilmeyenler konuşmasın, boşuna vakit kaybediyoruz.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Bilmemek değil bu, kadını güçlendireceksin.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Diğer yandan, sosyal yardımlarla ilgili yine alanı bilmeyen arkadaşların söyledikleriyle ilgili ifade edeyim. Vaktinde bu kurum kurulurken -çok kıymetli bir zamanda kuruldu- sadece 4 yardım kalemi vardı, sadece 4 yardım kalemi vardı.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Kadını birey olarak var edeceksin.
ALİYE TİMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - "Kadının güçlendirilmesi" diye başlık atmayı çok iyi biliyorsunuz.
OTURUM BAŞKANI NİLGÜN ÖK - Değerli milletvekilleri, lütfen dinleyelim.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Yapılan sosyal yardım kadını güçlendirmeli.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Bugün 49'a çıkmasını "Yoksulluğu artırdınız." diye okuyorlar.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Ya, sosyal yardıma ne gerek var, adaletli gelir dağılımı yapın.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Bu, sadece Aristo mantığıyla okumaktadır.
ALİYE TİMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - Bir kere alanı sen biliyorsun, bir alanı çık, bir pazara git, bir gör kadınların hâlini.
MÜHİP KANKO (Kocaeli) - Ne pazarı ya, pazarda işleri mi var?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Bakın, sosyal politikalarda "kapsayıcı kalkınma yaklaşımı" diye bir yaklaşım vardır. Bunu bilmeyenlerin bu konuyu konuşmamasını istirham ediyorum.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Bence sen konuşma!
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Sen neyi konuştun?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Sadece 4 yardım kaleminin içinde...
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - O pembe tabloları bırakın!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Bugün 49 kalem oldu, içinde elektrik desteği, kronik hastalıklara kesintisiz güç kaynağı desteği, asker ailelerine yardım gibi bu kapsayıcı kalkınma yaklaşımının sonucu olarak artan refahı yani orta üst gelir grubuna gelen Türkiye'nin artan refahı paylaşmasının sonucudur bu.
ALİYE TİMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - Kâğıda yazıyorsunuz sadece.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - 22 bin lirayla mı arttı refahınız? Asgari ücrete bak, asgari ücrete.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - İşinize gelmeyince bağırırsınız, her zaman yaptığınız o.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - "Refah bu." diyorsan gel, o refahı yapalım.
ALİYE TİMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - Hayal âlemindesiniz herhâlde.
OTURUM BAŞKANI NİLGÜN ÖK - Değerli milletvekilleri, lütfen... Lütfen sükûneti tesis edelim.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Diğer yandan, şunu da ifade etmem lazım: Bakın, bir buçuk yıl oldu, Avrupa Konseyi 24 Mayıs 2024'te bir deklarasyon yayınladı. İstanbul Sözleşmesi'ni imzalayan ülkelere yayınladı bu deklarasyonu. Şu hazırundan bir buçuk yıldır bir tek cümle duymuyoruz bu konuda. Ne dedi Avrupa Konseyi? "Sözleşmeyi imzaladınız, şu kadar zaman geçti ama gereğini yapmadınız." dedi bütün Avrupa ülkelerine ve bu deklarasyonda 51 madde yayınladı.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Biz ne yaptık?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Açıp bakmadınız bile, ezbere konuşuyorsunuz.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Biz ne yaptık, biz?
ALİYE TİMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - Ne yaptınız?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - 51 madde yayınladı bir buçuk yıl önce ve dedi ki "2026..."
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Vay be! Vay be!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Ayağa kalkma, otur yerine! Otur yerine! Otur yerine, bilmiyorsun!
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - 391 kişi öldü bugün itibarıyla, 391 kadın.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Sürekli tekrar ediyorsunuz aynı lafları!
OTURUM BAŞKANI NİLGÜN ÖK - Sayın Kaya, lütfen...
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - 391 kadın öldü bugün itibarıyla.
ŞENGÜL KARSLI (İstanbul) - Bir kadının bir kadına bu yaptığı çok ayıp!
(Gürültüler)
OTURUM BAŞKANI NİLGÜN ÖK - Sayın Kaya, lütfen...
Değerli arkadaşlar, lütfen yerinize oturun. Lütfen...
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Bilmiyorsunuz, oturun yerinize!
OTURUM BAŞKANI NİLGÜN ÖK - Sayın Keşir, lütfen...
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Bir buçuk yıl oldu.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - 391 kadının vebali boynunuza olsun, 391 kadın!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Bu konuda tek cümle etmediniz çünkü bu konuyu bilmiyorsunuz!
OTURUM BAŞKANI NİLGÜN ÖK - Değerli milletvekilleri, lütfen...
(Gürültüler)
OTURUM BAŞKANI NİLGÜN ÖK - Değerli milletvekilleri, lütfen sessizliği tesis edelim.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Avrupa Konseyi -51 maddeyi- İstanbul Sözleşmesi'ni imzalayan ülkelere "Size üç yıl süre veriyorum, gereğini yapın." dedi.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - 391 kadın!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Sözleşmenin gereğini yapmadı Avrupa ülkeleri.

records.englishTranslation:
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Thank you, President.
At the beginning of my words, I wish mercy to our air martyrs, may they rest in peace.
Today is also the anniversary of the 12 November, 1999 Düzce earthquake. On this occasion, I would like to commemorate our citizens who died in the earthquake. After the earthquake, in which 83 percent of the city was destroyed, approximately 80 percent of the city has now been reconstructed in accordance with earthquake specifications, with new construction. In this sense, I would like to express that we will work with all our strength to prevent the same pain from happening again.
Due to lack of time, I would like to quickly touch upon a few points. First of all, there is something we cannot agree on with you; There is a paradigm shift in politics in our AK PARTY, I do not expect you to understand this. We do not say either women's rights or family, we do not prefer one or the other. Even in our first election declaration, we said both the strengthening of the family and the empowerment of women; Those who are curious can open it and take a look. For him.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Is that why you allocated 1 percent share from the budget, 1 percent?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - No, you know that wrong too, I'll tell you, have a little patience.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - No, we know it right.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I do not expect you to understand such a paradigm change; AK PARTY does not choose either or.
On the other hand, "1 percent in the budget." They say, I think we would progress more efficiently in this regard if you let the people working in the field talk a little. Look, the budget figures are here, you base them on the title of "women's empowerment", but it is obvious that you do not know the Ministry at all and we do not know it.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - We know very well.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - 61 percent of poverty alleviation and social aid goes to women, 173 billion of the 284 billion you see there goes to women.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Do you think that women receiving social assistance will become stronger?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Likewise, 52 percent of the budget allocated for the disabled, 52 percent of 128 billion, that is, 66 billion, goes to women.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - You have to ensure the security of women, empowering women in every aspect is not help.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Those who do not know the field should not talk, we are wasting our time.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - This is not about not knowing, you will empower women.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - On the other hand, let me express what friends who do not know the field say about social aid. When this institution was established at the time - it was established at a very important time - there were only 4 aid items, only 4 aid items.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - You will create women as individuals.
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - You know very well how to write a title like "Women's empowerment".
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please let's listen.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Social aid provided should empower women.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - "You have increased poverty." they read.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Why is there a need for social aid? Distribute income fairly.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - This reads only with Aristotelian logic.
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - First of all, you know the area, go out to an area, go to a market, see the situation of women.

MÜHİP KANKO (Kocaeli) - What kind of market? Do they have business in the market?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Look, there is an approach called "inclusive development approach" in social policies. I request those who do not know this not to talk about this issue.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - I don't think you should talk!
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - What did you talk about?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Among only 4 aid items.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Leave those pink paintings!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Today there are 49 items, including electricity support, uninterrupted power supply support for chronic diseases, assistance to military families, etc. This is the result of Turkey sharing the increased prosperity as a result of this inclusive development approach, that is, Türkiye, which is in the upper middle income group.
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - You just write on paper.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Did your prosperity increase with 22 thousand liras? Look at the minimum wage, the minimum wage.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - When it doesn't work for you, you shout, that's what you always do.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - "This is prosperity." If you say, come, let's do that prosperity.
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - You must be in a dream world.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please. Please let's restore calm.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - On the other hand, I have to express this: Look, it has been a year and a half, the European Council published a declaration on May 24, 2024. He published this declaration to the countries that signed the Istanbul Convention. We haven't heard a single sentence about this for a year and a half now. What did the European Council say? "You signed the contract, this much time has passed, but you have not done what is necessary." He said to all European countries and published 51 articles in this declaration.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - What did we do?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - You didn't even look at it, you are talking by heart.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - What did we do, us?
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - What did you do?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - He published 51 articles a year and a half ago and said "2026."
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Wow! Wow!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Don't stand up, sit down! Sit down! Sit down, you don't know!
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - 391 people died as of today, 391 women.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - You keep repeating the same words!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Kaya, please.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - 391 women died as of today.
ŞENGÜL KARSLI (Istanbul) - What a woman does to another woman is such a shame!
(Noises)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Kaya, please.
Dear friends, please take your seats. Please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - You don't know, sit down!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Mr. Keşir, please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - It's been a year and a half.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - May the blame be upon you, 391 women!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - You didn't say a single sentence about this issue because you don't know about it!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please.
(Noises)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, let's establish silence.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - The Council of Europe said to the countries that signed the Istanbul Convention - 51 articles - "I am giving you three years, do what is necessary." he said.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - 391 women!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - European countries did not comply with the contract.

ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - When you gave up the contract, it was the time when the lowest number of femicides were committed.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - So, what did we do? Look, you accuse us of breaking the contract. Those 51 items.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Give account of 391 women, 391!
SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - You did not leave the contract and we are wrong?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - We compared those 51 articles with our domestic law. Even though we left the agreement, we compared the 51 articles given by the Council of Europe in the declaration with our domestic law and we have fulfilled all of them. Plus, we have 2 more apps; one is electronic bracelet, one is changing the identity of the victim.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - There are 391 deaths among women, 391 among the public.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Don't speak ignorantly, don't speak ignorantly!
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Account for 391 women.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - On the other hand.
(Noises)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - On the other hand.
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - If you did it, why did you come out?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please.
Dear MPs, when it is your turn to speak, you can explain your point. Please.
(Noises)
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Their voices cannot be heard.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - After leaving the Istanbul Convention, we never took a step back in our determination to combat violence against women.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Explain this first, explain this!
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Your determination.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Look, we have made a regulation regarding the violence applied to divorced spouses to be applied to married spouses.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Tell me about determination, tell me!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - We abolished ties and similar regulations that were good conduct practices.
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - What did you remove?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - We removed it.
On the other hand.
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - You do everything on paper!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Ms. Aliye, we cannot hear you.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Ağbaba, please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Of course, it is normal for there to be such an outburst of anger as their ignorance is revealed.
(Noises)
SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Our anger is for the murdered women, Mr. Keşir!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Look, on the other hand, it has been twenty-three years and "You lock women in the house." you say.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Ms. Semra, we can't hear Ms. Semra.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Friends, while you were turning women away from the school gates, today, under the AK Party government, 52 percent of girls are university graduates.
(Noises)
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - Oh, that's enough!
REŞAT KARAGÖZ (Amasya) - But they are all in vain!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - While you put women in Parliament, today 20 percent of the deputies in the Parliament are women.
(Mutual exchanges and noises between AK PARTY and CHP MPs)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Kaya, please. It's not possible by standing up, Mr. Kaya, please sit down.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Maybe you will be ashamed, maybe you will be ashamed!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - It is under this roof that you put women in their place and put them in front of the door.

(Mutual exchanges and noises between AK PARTY and CHP MPs)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Mr. Kaya. Dear friends, please.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Saliha is looking at you, Saliha!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Sit down, sit down!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - While their husbands put the women in front of the door. Look, here, read, read a little.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Look at this! Look at this, this!
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - What's wrong with that!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please take your seats.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Today, 60 percent of faculty members are women and 51 percent of research assistants are women.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Look at this, this!
SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - How many are rectors? Say them too. How many of them does your President appoint as rectors?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Today, 46 percent of judges are women, and 56 percent of those working in the health sector today are women. Today, the rate of female associate professors is 40 percent. Are these the women we locked in their homes?
(Noises)
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - How will you look at these?
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - You speak ignorantly, you speak by heart and you still abuse women's rights!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Mr. Keşir.
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - There is 1 woman in 17 ministers!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear friends, dear MPs; We can't get anywhere by standing up like this, shouting and yelling at each other. Please.
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - There is 1 woman in 17 ministers!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. President, we cannot hear our friends.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, I request you.
(Noises)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Friends.
ŞENGÜL KARSLI (Istanbul) - Violence of women against women.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs. Dear Brother.
Dear Ağbaba, please intervene in your group.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - We cannot hear the voices of our friends.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Ağbaba, please.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I have nothing to say about the fight against violence against women.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - It never ends!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - It doesn't end.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear friends, please let's stay calm.
(Noises)
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Look, when our friends here talk about the responsibilities of municipalities with Law No. 5393.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Let him understand this, let him look at this!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Kaya, please let's stay calm.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - You made a lot of illustrations,
You walked around the edge.
You have not been able to open a shelter in the last five years, especially in Istanbul and Ankara; Come on, I understand, you failed, but why did you close the shelters opened by AK PARTY municipalities in Pendik and Eyüp, why?
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - You had the Ankara Municipality for twenty-five years, why didn't you open it?
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - It is the responsibility of the state! Do not put the responsibility of the state on municipalities; You manage a huge billion-dollar budget!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Why did you close the shelters opened by AK PARTY municipalities in Pendik and Eyüpsultan? Did you fail to manage them? In that sense, don't talk at all! Don't talk at all!

ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - You had Ankara for twenty-five years, you could not open anything other than ANKAPARK!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - On the other hand, when one of our speakers just spoke about SED aid, I am truly sorry that you are ignorant on the subject, on behalf of this Commission, because look, socioeconomic support.
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - You are the ignorant one! You are the ignorant one! Speak carefully, you are the ignorant one!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Open it and read it!
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - You are the ignorant, you, you!
SEMRA DİNÇER (Ankara) - Ignorant!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I said "Ignorant of the subject", don't divert the conversation!
Socioeconomic support is a support given only to those in economic poverty; a support given to families who have fallen into temporary poverty due to disaster or illness; A support provided for children in foster care.
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - Well, half of the country is already suffering from economic poverty, half of the country is suffering!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Where is there abuse and where is there rape? Those who are ignorant on the subject, those who are not experts, those who do not know the concepts, please do not come here and provoke this place.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - In the municipal elections in Osmaniye, your AK PARTY officials distributed AFAD boxes! Please explain this, explain this! I came upon it too!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - One of the previous speakers said a word that made me very sad; I waited for the minutes but couldn't find them; I hope I misunderstood. "Child mafia," he said. Look, a speaker used the phrase "child mafia." This is a sign that the subject and concepts are not known. When talking about crime and crime-related issues related to children, this is determined by the literature and the concept expressed here is "children dragged into crime". I would also like to put on record that I reject the term "child mafia" here.
Dear Minister, congratulations on your budget. Of course, we have shortcomings; As human beings exist, new needs emerge, and politics is the art of finding solutions to these new needs.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - So you couldn't find it for twenty-three years!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - I hope that your budget will be auspicious, with the belief that you will solve all the newly emerging needs with this new budget.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Thank you, Mr. Keşir.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - Femicide made a comeback during your period, and you couldn't do anything in twenty-three years! It is increasing logarithmically every year.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear Kaya, please.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - You couldn't give an answer to this table, that chart!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Go and hold the municipalities accountable!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear friends.
ASU KAYA (Osmaniye) - We return these insulting speeches to you! Your insulting expressions suit you! The word "ignorant" suits you! I'm returning it all to you, but only to you!
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Go and hold the municipalities accountable!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - Dear MPs, please, that's enough.
AYŞE KEŞİR (Düzce) - Go and hold the municipalities accountable!
